---
title: "Completeness proof progress"
---

## Current route

A candidate proof proceeds by contraposition through a Henkin term model:

1. `foundations.qmd` defines signatures, terms, formulas, and substitution.
2. `calculus.qmd` defines the Hilbert calculus and establishes the deduction,
   consistency, maximality, and fresh-witness lemmas.
3. `semantics.qmd` defines satisfaction and proves the equality-aware
   canonical truth lemma.
4. `henkin.qmd` constructs witnesses and proves that every consistent theory
   has a model.
5. `main-proof.qmd` applies model existence to
   \(\Gamma\cup\{\neg\varphi\}\).

## Open dependencies

No mathematical dependency is intentionally left open.  Mechanical inspection
and independent mathematical verification of the exact candidate and its
dependency closure are still pending.  Zorn's lemma, the well-ordering theorem,
and transfinite recursion are allowed background set-theoretic principles;
completeness, compactness, and model existence are not imported.

## Completed intermediate results

The four subject files contain the intended intermediate declarations and
proofs.  This is a readiness claim for inspection, not an acceptance claim.

## Abandoned approaches

None.
